subcodes.first_line: My spirit and my essence are a sacrifice unto Thee; yea, my soul and my being are offered up for Thee. Days have passed, and the servant hath not attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی و ذاتی لک الفداء ثم سری و کینونتی لک الفداء قد مضت ایام و ما فاز الخادم
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
